Title: Cached old landing page redirects users away from /fund
Repro Steps: Visit greengoods.app/fund from a browser profile with the old landing page cached
Expected: Page loads /fund route
Actual: Redirects to outdated landing page; fresh profile + cache-bypass needed

Title: Connect Wallet button persists after wallet connected (blocks all wallet txns)
Repro Steps: 1) Visit /fund. 2) Click Endow → Pay with Wrapped Ether. 3) Type amount. 4) Click Connect Wallet — modal opens showing connected wallet. 5) Close. CTA still says Connect Wallet. Repro on /cookies too.
Expected: Once wallet connected, CTA transitions to Submit transaction
Actual: CTA stuck on Connect Wallet indefinitely; no submit path
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Matt Strachman · P0 release blocker

Title: Cookie Jar balance requires manual page refresh
Repro Steps: Open /cookies, lack deposit token, swap on Arbitrum, return to /cookies — balance still zero until reload
Expected: Balance auto-updates (TanStack Query focus / chain event)
Actual: Stale balance; manual reload required

Title: Brave install creates browser shortcut, not real PWA install
Repro Steps: Open greengoods.app in Brave on Android → tap Install. Open from home screen. Open greengoods.app in Brave again → install prompt re-appears.
Expected: Either Brave installs PWA properly, or app detects Brave and warns
Actual: Brave installs shortcut only; user installs multiple times

Title: "Updating" state hangs 3+ minutes after Update App click
Repro Steps: Install PWA via Chrome on Android, wait for in-app update prompt, tap Update — observe Updating screen hang >3 minutes
Expected: Service worker updates → reload → app on new version <30s
Actual: Stuck on Updating screen indefinitely

Title: "Update App" button shows even when on latest version
Repro Steps: Install PWA, finish update if any — Update App button still rendered despite being on latest
Expected: Button gated on registration.waiting being non-null
Actual: Button always rendered

Title: After uninstall, Chrome refuses to re-install (only shows Open the app)
Repro Steps: Install PWA via Chrome on Android, uninstall, clear cache, open greengoods.app in Chrome — still only shows Open the app
Expected: Install prompt re-appears since PWA is no longer installed
Actual: Chrome treats manifest as already-installed even after uninstall

Title: Browser version stuck on Open the app page after install
Repro Steps: Install PWA, open greengoods.app in Chrome browser — page only shows Open the app CTA; no login form, no website content
Expected: Browser version functions independently of installed-PWA presence
Actual: Detection logic dumps users into redirect-to-app intercept page

Title: Profile page columns break on long garden names
Repro Steps: Open profile page for user in a garden with long name (30+ chars)
Expected: Garden name truncates with ellipsis or wraps; columns stay aligned
Actual: Column breaks; can't read everything

Title: Passkey created in browser doesn't transfer to PWA (architectural)
Repro Steps: Create account on greengoods.app in browser using passkey, install PWA, open PWA, attempt passkey login
Expected: Same Google-stored passkey works across browser and PWA on same device
Actual: Separate keystore per environment; user must re-register
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Guilherme Ferreira · architectural, blocked by passkey-removal decision

Title: "Log in with Google" errors on first attempt, succeeds on retry
Repro Steps: On PWA login screen, click Log in with Google → OAuth modal opens, errors. Click again → succeeds.
Expected: First click works reliably
Actual: First click fails ~50% of the time
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Guilherme Ferreira · flaky social login

Title: Cannot log back in after passkey logout
Repro Steps: Create new account with passkey, logout, attempt to sign in with same passkey
Expected: Same passkey re-authenticates the user
Actual: Auth flow rejects re-entry
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Guilherme Ferreira · architectural, tied to passkey removal

Title: Admin garden switch hangs the entire UI
Repro Steps: Open admin.greengoods.app/hub, switch garden Green Goods Community Garden → Grow Ecosystem — UI freezes, buttons/links unresponsive
Expected: Garden context switches; new garden's data loads
Actual: UI hangs; URL updates but rendered content does not
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Caue Tomaz · P0 release blocker for operators

Title: Joining a garden redirects to Green Goods Garden incorrectly
Repro Steps: Join Grow Ecosystem garden, click into vault — vault loads under Green Goods Garden context
Expected: Vault loads under user's currently-selected garden
Actual: Default-garden override on subroute navigation

Title: URL updates when switching gardens but UI doesn't refresh
Repro Steps: Switch garden from Green Goods to Grow Ecosystem — observe URL + UI diverge
Expected: URL change ↔ UI render in sync
Actual: URL updates; UI lags or freezes
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Afolabi Aiyeloja (observing Caue) · same root as D-013

Title: No visible scrollbar on Admin tabs
Repro Steps: Open admin dashboard, navigate to a content tab > viewport-height, attempt to scroll using mouse on right edge
Expected: Standard scrollbar appears; user can drag
Actual: No visible scrollbar; only gesture-scroll works
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Caue Tomaz · CSS-only fix

Title: Admin Dashboard layout doesn't use full screen
Repro Steps: Open admin dashboard on typical desktop viewport (1440x900+)
Expected: Layout fills viewport, respecting max-width tokens for content lines
Actual: Content boxed into a small inner region

Title: Media uploads show as link only, not displayed
Repro Steps: Open admin garden settings, upload image for garden — only link appears, no preview thumbnail, no image shown anywhere
Expected: Preview thumbnail after upload; image visible in garden detail view
Actual: Just a link; no preview, no display
Notes: QA Sync 2026-05-13 — Caue Tomaz · action item: new media uploader

Title: Domains button doesn't open pop-up
Repro Steps: Open admin garden settings, click Domains button
Expected: Pop-up / modal opens for managing domains
Actual: Click does nothing

Title: ENS names not resolving on Admin — showing raw addresses (regression)
Repro Steps: Open admin members tab for a garden with at least one ENS-mapped wallet
Expected: ENS-resolved name shown where available, raw address fallback only when no ENS
Actual: Raw addresses shown across the board

Title: PostHog $exception captured with null type/message (telemetry triage gap)
Repro Steps: PostHog → either project → Events → filter event = $exception → all rows have null properties.$exception_message
Expected: Each exception carries JS error type + message per posthog.captureException payload
Actual: All exceptions have null type + message across both App and Admin projects
